name: Publication
description: Profile for scholarly publications and citable research outputs with persistent identifiers, publication metadata, and attribution information.
ExpectedUse: Metadata for journal articles, conference papers, preprints, datasets with DOIs, software publications, and other formally published research outputs requiring citation metadata.

Properties.Name: doi
Properties.Title: DOI
Properties.Description: Digital Object Identifier for persistent citation

Properties.Name: publisher
Properties.Title: Publisher
Properties.Description: Organization responsible for making the resource available

Properties.Name: datePublished
Properties.Title: Publication Date
Properties.Description: Date when the resource was formally published
